topics.name: MA1011 - Principles of Differential and Integral Calculus

subtopics.name: Differential Calculus of functions of several variables: Review of Limit

Partial differentiation; Total differentiation; Euler’s theorem and generalization; Change of variables- Jacobians; Maxima and minima of functions of several variables (2 and 3 variables); Lagrange’s method of multipliers.

Integral Calculus: Convergence of improper integrals; Beta and Gamma integrals; Differentiation under integral sign; Double and Triple integrals - computation of surface areas and volumes; change of variables in double and triple integrals.

Vector Calculus: Scalar and vector fields; vector differentiation; level surfaces; directional derivative; gradient of a scalar field; divergence and curl of a vector field; Laplacian; Line and Surface integrals; Green’s theorem in a plane; Stokes’ theorem; Gauss Divergence theorem.
